title: Tiki Config
description: Project-level configuration for Tiki workflow commands (.tiki/config.json)

workflow.description: Workflow behavior for the GET -> SHIP pipeline

backupRetention.description: Number of timestamped state.json backups to keep (default 10)

testsConfig.description: Test-running behavior during EXECUTE and SHIP

enabled.description: Whether tests run at all (default true)

command.description: Explicit test command override. If null, the framework auto-detects (vitest, jest, pytest, cargo test, go test).

runOnEachPhase.description: Run tests after every phase, not just the final one (default false)

runBeforeShip.description: Run the full test suite before shipping (default true)

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for a test run (default 300)

autoHealConfig.description: Opt-in auto-heal loop for failed phase verification

enabled.description: Whether independent phases may run in parallel (default true)

template.description: Path to a custom changelog template with placeholders

categories.description: Maps commit prefixes to display category names

includeCommitHashes.description: Include commit hashes in changelog entries (default false)

includeAuthors.description: Include commit authors in changelog entries (default false)
